name: Shipcloud Multi-Carrier Shipping
description: Create shipments, generate labels, and track parcels across all major German and European carriers (DHL, DPD, GLS, Hermes, UPS, FedEx, TNT) through Shipcloud — the leading multi-carrier shipping aggregator for DE.
instructions:
This connector uses the Shipcloud v1 REST API.

**Credentials**: a single API key (Basic auth username, empty password). Generate one at https://app.shipcloud.io/account under API-Keys. Paste it into `SHIPCLOUD_API_KEY` when importing.

**Carriers covered**: dhl, dhl_express, dpd, gls, hermes, ups, fedex, tnt, go, deutsche_post, iloxx, parcelone, skynet, liefery. Use `shipcloud_list_carriers` to retrieve IDs and available service products.

**Label creation**: `shipcloud_create_shipment` returns a downloadable label URL plus a carrier_tracking_no and a shipcloud tracking_url. Labels are PDF by default.

**Tracking**: parcels shipped through Shipcloud are auto-tracked — use `shipcloud_get_shipment` with the shipcloud id to read status. For external parcels (not shipped via Shipcloud), create a tracking object with `shipcloud_create_tracker`.

**Webhooks**: Shipcloud also supports webhooks for real-time status updates (configure in the dashboard, not via this adapter).

**Test mode**: set `create_shipping_label: false` when calling create_shipment to get a quote without actually creating a real label (and without being billed).

tools.name: shipcloud_list_carriers
tools.description: List all carriers supported by the Shipcloud account with their names, IDs, service products (e.g. dhl:standard, dpd:classic), and feature flags (label_printer, tracking, etc.).

tools.name: shipcloud_create_shipment
tools.description: Create a shipment and generate a shipping label. Returns the shipcloud shipment id, carrier tracking number, label PDF URL, tracking URL, and price. Set create_shipping_label=false for a quote without billing.

to.description: Recipient address: { company?, first_name, last_name, street, street_no, zip_code, city, country (ISO 2-letter) }.

from.description: Sender address — same shape as 'to'. Optional if a default is configured in the Shipcloud account.

package.description: Package dimensions: { weight (kg), length?, width?, height? (all in cm), type? ('parcel'|'letter'|'bulk') }.

reference_number.description: Optional customer reference to identify the shipment.

create_shipping_label.description: If true (default), generate a real label and bill. If false, returns a quote only.

additional_services.description: Optional extras: saturday_delivery, cash_on_delivery, advance_notice, delivery_date etc.

tools.name: shipcloud_get_shipment
tools.description: Retrieve a shipment created via Shipcloud by its id. Returns all fields including tracking events, label URL, and carrier tracking number.

tools.name: shipcloud_list_shipments
tools.description: List recent shipments created via this account, filterable by carrier, date range, or customer reference.

carrier_tracking_no.description: Filter by the carrier's tracking number.

tools.name: shipcloud_create_tracker
tools.description: Create a tracking object for an external parcel (not shipped via this Shipcloud account). Provide the carrier and carrier_tracking_no; Shipcloud will poll the carrier for status updates.

carrier_tracking_no.description: The tracking number issued by the carrier.

tools.name: shipcloud_get_tracker
tools.description: Retrieve the current state and event history of a tracking object.
